text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Look, Mr. C.B. and Maruzensky are talking
together!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I bet they're discussing incredibly high-level race
techniques!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way to lunch, I spot two students at the
center of a crowd. I'm looking on absentmindedly
when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hey, you there! Would you mind coming over
here for a sec?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Are you free to talk? I've got a question for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mr. C.B. has a stern look on her face. I can tell
she's about to ask a complex question about
racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can provide a response sophisticated
enough to show that I'm a reputable trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: How can I get better at cooking?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: C.B. came to ask me for advice on living alone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried about her. And I'd like her to
take good care of herself.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You live alone, right, Trainer? Don't you have any
sweet tips to offer?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I'm a bit of a scatterbrain, you know!
Some of the stuff I do would probably give you a
good laugh!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But cooking's such a hassle, right? I always end up
making simple dishes like fried rice.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can't live like that! A racer's body is her
greatest asset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I learn that there's more to Mr. C.B. than I
thought. Although I do find myself wanting to
give her heaps of advice...
choice_data_list:
I'm probably not the right person to ask about
that.

I'm probably not the right person to ask about
that.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hm? Really?
choice_data_list: I always let my laundry pile up...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ugh, tell me about it!
choice_data_list: And I always put off cleaning.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: I hear that!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I'm too lazy to cook every night, so I just make a
massive portion of curry in advance!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That great big washing machine in the dorm really
comes in handy if you've got a heap of laundry to
do. You can wash it all at once.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And never store curry at room temperature. It
spoils really fast, so make sure you put it in the
fridge, or freeze it right after cooking.
choice_data_list: You really know all about this stuff!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heh, I guess a little. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Boy, living on your own makes you appreciate
what your parents did for you, huh!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Having someone cook three meals a day for you
is pretty incredible when you think about it.
choice_data_list:
Actually, you asked about cooking in the first
place, right?

Actually, you asked about cooking in the first
place, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes, I'd almost forgotten what this was all
about.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ooh, did you get a flash of inspiration?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My conversation with Mr. C.B. painted a clear
picture of a laid-back, orderless lifestyle. The
best advice for someone like her would be...
choice_data_list:
I think rough-and-ready cooking suits you
perfectly.

I think rough-and-ready cooking suits you
perfectly.

Challenge yourself to whip up some creative
cuisine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My conversation with Mr. C.B. painted a clear
picture of a laid-back, orderless lifestyle. The
best advice for someone like her would be...
choice_data_list:
I think rough-and-ready cooking suits you
perfectly.

I think rough-and-ready cooking suits you
perfectly.

Challenge yourself to whip up some creative
cuisine!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Haha! You sure know how to give a compliment.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I am Mr. C.B., after all. If worrying
about the details keeps me from having any fun,
then there's no point!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, true. Fun is definitely the best ingredient.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, you two! I'd like to invite you both to
dinner to show my appreciation. How about it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mr. C.B.'s approach to cooking is
undoubtedly crude, the results are delicious.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Something creative! I like the sound of that!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I've cooked Italian food before, for
example, but it's totes difficult. Are you really up
for this?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have no idea how this is going to turn out,
but I'm always up for a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Time to enjoy some creative freedom. This is
getting exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mr. C.B. gets to work on some original
dishes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes super sweet mapo tofu,
ramen-flavored pizza, and deep-fried fruit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
None of the dishes end up tasting very good, but
after seeing how much fun she had cooking
everything, I can't help but feel happy myself,
too.
